description: rank_search_matches re-ranks the single staged Flynn result (from record-search-1850-census-flynn) against tree subject I1 (Patrick Flynn, b.~1845 Ireland). The one candidate (ark MXHY-TP4, 'Patrick Flynn in household of Thomas Flynn') is a GENUINE person match — it scores high (0.9376, matchConfidence 5) because it is the right Patrick — but it comes from 'United States Census, 1850', NOT the 1870 census the search asked for. The high match score is deliberate: it exercises the Step-4 collection sanity-check, proving the skill must not let a strong person-match score override a wrong-collection result. Matched on subjectId (wildcard '~'); independent of the stagedResultsRef handle (a per-run uuid).
